Also another cool immersion I was thinking of was a toggle on/off blood running in the eyes that you can actually wipe off with your glove. This games really fun and with ah couple tweaks could stand with games like thrill of the fight and golden gloves at a much better price. Very impressive hope you keep updating this🥊

developer_response.body: Hi, To knock down an opponent, you must hit his weak points, e.g. chin. To see his weak points, select Show Weak Points in the settings.

And also it would be cool to be able to kick in the street fight mode maybe by pressing up on the right thumb stick? 😄 All in all I 100% recommend this game!!!

developer_response.body: There are currently 7 opponents available. You can also train at the virtual boxing gym on: heavy bag, speed bag, dummy bag, focus bag, boxing bar, boxing machine, pads. I also plan to add a mode where you can fight multiple opponents simultaneously.

reviews.review_description: It is a great game after two fights. I was sweating very much. This could be very well for your exercise and weight loss. It is quite realistic compared to other fighting games for example, of a knockout they full on ragdoll instead of walking back and stumbling, and then falling. not only that but the blood and cuts from the hits. Only reason why it’s not a five is because you cannot kick even though the enemies can, and there are no takedowns, which is fine, but that would really add the cherry on top would recommend. ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. You can set your height in the main menu: min 140cm (4'7") - max 210cm (6'11").

Any posibility about adding movement on him, he walking or going to one side etc. . Is tgere any way to add mixed reality to the app? Thanks, congrats i hope it keeps improving !!

reviews.review_description: Was the game nerfed recently? Because im knocking down the enemy way too often now, I wish there was a difficulty option

developer_response.body: Hello, nothing has changed in the game recently. To increase the difficulty, disable the "counter hit knockdown" option and increase the "knockdown bar regeneration speed".

reviews.review_description: The menu spawned BEHIND me, and now I have to fight the opponents while hitting stuff IRL and hurting my hands. You can literally only damage them if you hit the weak points. The worst part is that this game has a lot of potential, but the developer screwed up and made little to no quality of life settings. Don't waste your money on this game.

developer_response.body: Hello,  the Quest calculates the largest possible rectangular area within your boundary this is the play area (white rectangle on the floor,  this is the area in which your opponent can move),  make sure you're drawing your Guardian Boundary free of any obstacles. You can change the direction of the play area by holding the meta / oculus button. I also wanted to inform you that this is not the final version of the game, I am still working on it.

reviews.review_title: game is really fun and realistic
reviews.review_description:
What I really like about the game is that you know when your hits start hurting the opponent. Also the blood and the cuts you can do to your opponent. I also like how they fall down after every knockdown, as it is realistic to me. The only problem is that I always lost when it went to the decision. Made me think that you only win the fight after knocking them out. 
Another little thing is that in the streetfight mode, your opponent kicks you. Maybe it isn‘t a problem, but I don‘t know if a normal block blocks those kicks.

I have some ideas too that can be put in the game:

career mode

different fighting styles that the enemy uses, like mire defensively, more aggresive, philly shell etc

different looks for the enemies

different locations where you can fight, like a ring with a huge crowd like if its a title fight, or a place where mostly amateur fighters fight like the one right now

If any of these things apply in the future, I will give this game a 5 star rating. In my opinion the boxing game with the most potential

reviews.review_title: Better than thrill of the fight IMO
reviews.review_description: Personally, I think this is favorite boxing game on quest so far. I’ve tried thrill of the fight 2 but because of the spammers in that game it’s just unplayable. This game is actually put together very well, the motion, the hitting, movement, everything is designed excellent. Can it be improved? Yes, definitely. A multi player option would be nice, hitting opponents with a body shot causes them to fly back for some reason. There’s a number of things they can do to get this smoother. But I personally think if you’re looking for a good workout with out the annoying people on thrill of the fight, this is the one!

reviews.review_title: I’m obsessed with this game but…
reviews.review_description: So i adore this game very well done but I down knockouts and more hits and I still lose the game some how and also try add mode where your in a ring where there’s a whole crowd and stuff

Looking at the price and the screenshots, this looks like a low budget game. But as a fan of VR boxing games, this was a positive surprise.

The graphics are simple, but the overall feeling is immersive. More so than many other titles. A nice feature is that in street fight you can also slap the opponent.

To improve this game the sound effects should be worked on. It's always the same sound when you land a hit, which gives a less immersive feeling. I would prefer more cinematic style sound effects, rather than the current Thrill of the Fight style.

A feature that I have always been wanting in fighting games is to keep hitting the opponent after them being knocked down. Just imagine if you have a difficult opponent, after losing several times and finally knocking them down... you just want to kill them while lying there on the ground.

I would also like to knock down or even start fights with the referee and the audience. Why should the game end? I want to be a trouble maker.
This game is terrible, it's just a blatant Thrill of the Fight ripoff and didn't even do a good job at that, I would recommend to go buy Thrill of the Fight instead of this.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, but I have a question. What made you buy the game?  If you tried it for free and didn't like it. You can reply to my email address: thefight.adam88@gmail.com, I also wanted to inform you that this is not the final version of the game, I am still working on it.
Thanks

reviews.review_description:
The training aspect of this game is far better than any other boxing game I’ve tried. It has more equipment to use, e.g. a spar bar, multi-pad station, speed bag. It’s the only one I know of that lets you train in the ring with a trainer using pads. And he throws the periodic punch back at you so you can practice your bobbing and weaving. Nice! 
The training is an excellent cardio workout.
The actual fighting part has its pros and cons. Pros: It has a street fight option. When you get hit, the screen briefly goes white which is better at simulating getting hit.
Cons: Some of the other comments here mention how slow the opponents move… I didn’t find that at all. I get hit a lot. Bobbing and weaving don’t seem to matter. I still got tagged.
I did discover that if you step in close and unleash a wave of uppercuts and jabs, your opponent hilariously goes “3 Stooges” as his head bobs uncontrollably from the blows. But he never goes down. I stood there for what seemed like 30 seconds with a barrage of about sixty or more punches delivered, but the opponent simply stood there taking all the shots without going down. So the actual fight experience needs to be improved on.
I would also like the opponents to be more photo-realistic similar to the pad trainer in the ring. Bald guy looked like some sort of mutant with his weirdly long and lumpy neck LOL.
Tip for the developer: My device’s screen outputs “tilted” a bit at one point during a street fight. I think it had something to do with my battery being low, but I’m not sure. 
Here’s the thing though… it immediately induced nausea for a second or two, since my eyes and head weren’t tracking in sync. 
This would be an excellent way to better simulate a blow to the head during a fight. I’m not sure that such a thing is technically possible, and, certainly, it should be an option to turn off. But, man, would it ramp up the stakes in a street fight simulation.

Even with the fighter punch speed turned up with the custom settings, they punch soooo slow. Also each fighter will go down if you hit any of the pressure points just 3 times. It's an amazing game, the best fighting vr game I've played so far after creed and thrill of the fight. There needs to be more fighters added and more animations that are MUCH faster. The fighting is way too easy and it's almost impossible to even get hurt.
Good workout and easy if u know how to fight

I have been playing this game an hour a day. Good for cardio. The only thing I'd like to see changed in the game is when the match/round starts you should be able to touch gloves and fight. I don't like the screen black and then when your character appears you're already getting punched. Other than that fun game. If that were to be fixed I'd change it to a 5 star. Also wish there was a story mode as well

reviews.review_description:

REPLY to DEV: in most apps you can recenter/relocate whole area by pressing Oculus button (long) including angle/front/back position.. (in my tight play area I had the buttons in your game unreachable 1 cm in the wall, so I wanted to use such feature but missing)

developer_response.body: Play area is a centered rectangle within the guardian boundaries you draw. You are intended to draw your boundary in unobstructed area.

reviews.review_description: Although this game is an amazing sequel to the amazing Bonworks, it lacks its own replay ability without mods. Sure, the developers knew this would be the case to some extent, so they put full mod support, but everyone has access to things like computers, or even want to add them in, making the experience more of a test that lets players tinker with the world they have made rather than a full game. I still ranked this a four because the gameplay mechanics, physics, and combat is amazing. The liminal nature of the universe sucks you in, the physics are too real, and the combat feels like you have the weapons actually with you,  it to mention, again, the mods. The community of moders in this community is outstanding, and they add more to the experience than we could ever imagine. All in all though, the game still lacks a reason to go back, it gives you no tutorial unless you have played boneworks (which isn’t even on quest 2), and an overall all over the place story that makes you just as clueless about the story at the as you were at the start.
Blocking doesn’t work and punches have no affect

It is good

reviews.review_title: A good starting point,could develop well
reviews.review_description:
For the money this is a great starting place for a potentially great game.
It's not as polished as Thrill Of The Fight, and there's quite a long way to go, but it's decent for the money you're spending on it.
Needs to be a lot faster, it's way too slow, even when you crank it to the 120% speed.  
The addition of the street fight option is great, though having to actually clench your fists (grip) not so much.
A lot of polish is needed, but it can get there for sure.

I think the developer should start a github issues page, to allow people to submit suggestions to help make the game better.

I really hope he continues with this and turns it into a great alternative to Thrill Of The Fight.
Could be better fighting the a.I is tough with there is no scoring etc the training side is very good with the pads and bag etc just the fighting A.I which is letting it down for me

I have "Thrill of the fight" which is much (actually *much much*) better in terms of fight realism. However, it lacks a challenging and motivating training option. 
"The fight" is a really good complement, especially the spinning bar and the pads training will improve your hand-eye-coordination, reflexes and cardio. I really would suggest to the developer(s) to focus on the training aspects, it is unique and super useful.  (While the box game AI cannot match TOTF in any way, at least currently).
As a sidenote: I also bought Creed for the same training aspects, but it is expensive and takes way to long to load, so "the fight" is much more effective.
As right as i entered the game the menu wasnt showing up just my boxing gloves and i was stuck cant dk anything i kept restarting the game but it didnt work

developer_response.body: Hi, probably the menu was behind you, the menu is 0.7 m from the center of the Play area. If you have any questions, please contact me by email thefight.adam88@gmail.com

reviews.review_description:
You won't go wrong to buy this game. It has better training equipment and graphic compare other boxing game. For the price, believe me it's totally worth of it!

Very suitable for your first boxing game. You will get well training here with the good boxing tutorial video on Youtube. 

To Game Team:

It would be great if it upgrade the frequency to 90 Hz or 120 Hz. And upgrade the AI difficulty or more opponents. Seems they don't like to punch me at all.

BTW, the game deserves a better game cover! Replace it and you will know the big difference!
The training mode is awesome. If you want to practice your boxing skills and to have a really good workout,  this is the game for you. Very well donc.
Bareknuckle  is fun. Could use beer mechanics,  but for $5 it's worth it.

The game itself is good but when you get to the fight with last boxer on the ring and you want do that on normal mode, not on custom then it is very very hard, you can throw punches for 3 rounds and you will not knock him out, and then he will win. This is also wierd because when you put everything on 90% then you can easily knock him out, but on 100% its nearly impossible, the same thing happens on street fight.
If your new to oculus and want a entry level boxing game this is the game to play and its only 5 dollars, amazing deal
